authors: Stuart Soroka Christopher Wlezien a Department of Communication
USAStuart Soroka is a Professor in the Departments of Communication and Political Science at the University of California
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了负面内容和错误信息在政治传播中的作用，分析了它们如何影响公众认知和态度。
plain_summary_en: This research examines the role of negativity and misinformation in political communication, analyzing how they affect public perception and attitudes.
research_direction_zh: 政治传播中的情感与信息质量研究，关注负面情绪和虚假信息对民主进程的影响。
research_direction_en: Research on emotion and information quality in political communication, focusing on the impact of negativity and false information on democratic processes.
